en: Rejoice not, O Israel!Exult not like the peoples; for you have played the whore, forsaking your God. You have loved a prostitute's wages on all threshing floors.
zh: 以色列啊！不要歡喜；不要像外族人一樣快樂， 因為你行了邪淫，離開你的 神， 在各打穀場上喜愛賣淫的賞賜。

en: Threshing floor and wine vat shall not feed them, and the new wine shall fail them.
zh: 打穀場和榨酒池不能餵養他們， 新酒也必使他們失望。

en: They shall not remain in the land of the LORD, but Ephraim shall return to Egypt, and they shall eat unclean food in Assyria.
zh: 他們必不得住在耶和華之地； 以法蓮要回到埃及去， 要在亞述吃不潔之物。

en: They shall not pour drink offerings of wine to the LORD, and their sacrifices shall not please him. It shall be like mourners' bread to them; all who eat of it shall be defiled; for their bread shall be for their hunger only; it shall not come to the house of the LORD.
zh: 他們必不得向耶和華奠酒， 他們的祭物也不能使他喜悅。 他們的餅好像喪家的餅， 凡吃這餅的，都必被玷污； 因為他們的餅只可自己吃， 不可帶進耶和華的殿。

en: What will you do on the day of the appointed festival, and on the day of the feast of the LORD?
zh: 那麼，在規定集會的日子 和耶和華節期的時候， 你們能作甚麼？

en: For behold, they are going away from destruction; but Egypt shall gather them; Memphis shall bury them. Nettles shall possess their precious things of silver; thorns shall be in their tents.
zh: 看哪！即使他們從毀滅中逃去， 埃及要收殮他們，摩弗要埋葬他們。 他們珍貴的銀器必為蒺藜所佔有， 他們的帳棚必長滿荊棘。

en: The days of punishment have come; the days of recompense have come; Israel shall know it. The prophet is a fool; the man of the spirit is mad, because of your great iniquity and great hatred.
zh: 懲罰的日子臨近， 報應的時候來到， 以色列必定知道， 因著你們眾多的罪孽和深仇大恨， 先知被看為愚昧， 受靈感動的人被當作瘋子。

en: The prophet is the watchman of Ephraim with my God; yet a fowler's snare is on all his ways, and hatred in the house of his God.
zh: 先知與 神一同 作以法蓮的守望者， 在他所行的一切路上，都滿有捕鳥人的網羅， 在他 神的家中只有仇恨。

en: They have deeply corrupted themselves as in the days of Gibeah: he will remember their iniquity; he will punish their sins.
zh: 以法蓮深深敗壞， 如同在基比亞的日子一般。 神必記得他們的罪孽， 懲罰他們的罪惡。

en: Like grapes in the wilderness, I found Israel. Like the first fruit on the fig tree in its first season, I saw your fathers. But they came to Baal-peor and consecrated themselves to the thing of shame, and became detestable like the thing they loved.
zh: “我遇見以色列，好像在曠野裡遇見葡萄。 我看見你們的列祖，像看見無花果樹初熟的果子。 他們卻來到巴力．毘珥，專作羞恥的事， 成為可憎惡的，像他們所愛的偶像一樣。

en: Ephraim's glory shall fly away like a bird- no birth, no pregnancy, no conception!
zh: 至於以法蓮，他們的榮耀必如鳥兒飛逝； 沒有生育，沒有懷胎，沒有成孕。

en: Even if they bring up children, I will bereave them till none is left. Woe to them when I depart from them!
zh: 即使他們把兒女養大， 我也必使他們喪子，一個不留。 我離棄他們的時候，他們就有禍了。”

en: Ephraim, as I have seen, was like a young palm planted in a meadow; but Ephraim must lead his children out to slaughter.
zh: 在我看來， 以法蓮的兒女注定被當作獵物； 以法蓮要把自己的兒女帶出來，交給施行殺戮的人。

en: Give them, O LORD- what will you give? Give them a miscarrying womb and dry breasts.
zh: 耶和華啊，求你賜給他們；你要賜給他們甚麼呢？ 求你使他們墜胎小產，乳房萎縮。

en: Every evil of theirs is in Gilgal; there I began to hate them. Because of the wickedness of their deeds I will drive them out of my house. I will love them no more; all their princes are rebels.
zh: “他們的一切罪惡都在吉甲， 我在那裡憎恨他們， 因他們的惡行， 我要把他們從我的家裡趕出來； 我不再愛他們， 他們的領袖都是叛徒。

en: Ephraim is stricken; their root is dried up; they shall bear no fruit. Even though they give birth, I will put their beloved children to death.
zh: 以法蓮被擊打，他們的根枯乾了， 必不能再結果子。 即使他們生產， 我必殺死他們所生的愛子。”

en: My God will reject them because they have not listened to him; they shall be wanderers among the nations.
zh: 我的 神必棄絕他們， 因為他們不聽從他； 他們必在列國中飄流。
